title: PATHWORKS PROGRAM - 211info
text: HOUSING WORKS PATHWORKS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one-on-one coaching aimed at increasing earned income and financial literacy to make progress toward economic independence and self-sufficiency. Goal-oriented coaching sessions may focus on employment, education, home ownership, small business development, health, etc. Also offers an excrow savings program and Individual Development Account program. 405 SW 6th Street Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Must hold current Housing Choice Voucher Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 923-1018 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 923-1018 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: By referral only. Call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish. Interpretation services available for other languages. AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Financial Literacy Training Individual Development Accounts Personal Financial Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOMEQUEST GROUND LEASE PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER WAITLIST If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
